note: PIVOT (2026-06): the project moved from a VLM 'See, Then Think' pipeline to a next-state-prediction world model. World-model features are the active roadmap; all are passes=false (nothing trained yet). The 'superseded' block preserves the parked VLM/encoder/commentary work and its real findings. Harness rule unchanged: work one feature at a time, verify before flipping passes=true.

features.name: World-model state tensors ready
features.description: 597-d feature_schema_v2 tensors built and on disk. parse_demos.py parses .dem -> per-tick parquet (awpy); build_tick_sequences.py assembles round-scoped 597-d frames at 8 Hz (125 ms). State = 10 players x 56 per-player + 37 global. Output: data/processed/tick_sequences/{train,val}.pt (historical first bake: 1471+262 rounds; current canonical = merged clean corpus 3,876/705, datasheet.md). Round-scoped: no attention across round resets; economy/score/round# carried as features.

features.name: Train world model — next-state prediction
features.description: Causal spatiotemporal transformer over game-state frames, trained state->state (NO text), like LM pretraining over game states. Round = a document (no cross-round attention). Distributional prediction head (discretize or GMM) to avoid mode-averaging blur. Default near-term predict a single future frame; horizon swept in W02. Borrows MLMove feature recipe (per-player tokens, derived visibility) but engineers ONLY L1/See perception primitives — the model LEARNS tactics (L2), no hand-engineered tactical labels.

features.name: Horizon sweep
features.description: Predict a future frame and sweep the prediction horizon 125 ms -> 2 s. k=+1 frame approximates MLMove-style positional inertia; strategic signal expected to emerge at longer horizons. Characterize the inertia->strategy transition across horizons.

features.name: Probe-transfer evaluation
features.description: Judge the world model by PROBE TRANSFER, not prediction loss. Freeze the latent, train lightweight value/event probes on it, measure those. A lower prediction loss that doesn't move the probes is not progress. This is the primary success metric for W01/W02.

features.name: Events from prediction surprise
features.description: Derive event boundaries from prediction surprise (high model error / low likelihood frames). Subsumes the parked change-point work — surprise is the semantic boundary the change-point losses failed to find. Evaluate against ground-truth kill/plant/defuse/round-end events.

features.name: Value / policy heads on the latent
features.description: MuZero-style value and policy heads attached to the frozen/finetuned world-model latent. Value = round-win probability; policy = next-action distribution. Builds on W01/W03.

features.name: Phase 2 — language bridge into the latent
features.description: Bridge a frozen LLM (Qwen 3.6/3.7, 35B-A3B MoE) into world-model latents. Start Flamingo-style: resampler -> read tokens + gated cross-attention; LoRA the LLM since the state latent is far OOD. Graduate to Mixture-of-Transformers (MoT). Training stages: templated grounding -> contrastive commentary -> GRPO reasoning rewarded by checking verbalized predictions vs actual futures. DISCIPLINE: ablate the latent — if removing it doesn't hurt the language head, it's circular.

superseded.note: Parked VLM 'See, Then Think' line of work. Scripts moved to scripts/_archive/; commentary work parked in the chimera-demo-pipeline repo. KEY LEARNINGS preserved here — they drove the pivot. 'passes' reflects the state reached before the pivot, not current priority.
key_learnings: Round encoder SATURATES at ~16 demos (negative slope beyond): outcome supervision (~1 bit/round) is information-starved.
Change-point losses find STATISTICAL, not SEMANTIC, boundaries — wrong objective for 'events'.
Claude-generated captions are CIRCULAR: they only paraphrase the structured features fed to them (discriminative-check gap only +0.008 over the structured ceiling).

Commentary grounding: global VOD<->demo alignment locks at 4.6 sigma (kills<->caster-name cross-correlation) but per-event anchoring is only ~25% (auto-caption ASR name-recall is the ceiling). Parked to phase 2.

features.name: Data schema & manifest
features.description: Unified data manifest (src/data/manifest.py, JSONL) for tracking screenshot provenance, source, timestamps. Collection scripts write to data/manifest.jsonl.

features.name: Demo data pipeline & viewer
features.description: Parse pro demos with awpy into full-tick Parquet + metadata JSONs. Interactive demo viewer (cs2-demo-viewer) with radar, vision cones, kill lines, timeline scrubbing — SUPERSEDED for rollout viz by in-repo viewer/gen_viewer.html (2026-07-18); cs2-demo-viewer dormant. 4 demos parsed in original scope (Furia vs Vitality: Mirage/Inferno/Nuke/Overpass, 83 rounds, 563 kills).

features.name: Screenshot-demo synchronization
features.description: PARKED. Capture CS2 screenshots via demo playback (SendKeys automation) and pair with ground truth game state from Parquet. All 4 maps complete: Mirage (548/1504), Inferno (1476/1476), Nuke (791/791), Overpass (1538/1538). Total: 4353 screenshots, 5309 labels.

features.name: SFT training — visual grounding
features.description: PARKED. SFT on Qwen 35B-A3B MoE to read the HUD: screenshot -> structured game_state JSON. LoRA r=4 a=8 on vision + language layers. Prior Qwen 3.5 SFT: 67.3% field accuracy (vs 50% Opus, 50% base Qwen), perfect on health/armor/money/round_phase.

features.name: GRPO dataset from demos
features.description: SUPERSEDED. Convert demo snapshots into decision training format (game state -> pro behavioral features + round_won + player_contribution phi). Never completed before pivot.

features.name: Data sparsity diagnostic
features.description: PARKED. Pre-training diagnostic measuring state bucket coverage (D023). At 4 demos: L0 96.2% coverage (23/30 buckets), L1 27.0% (89/2167). L0 marginal, L1 not viable. Foreshadowed the outcome-supervision information-starvation finding that drove the pivot.

features.name: Small-scale GRPO smoke test
features.description: PARKED. End-to-end GRPO pipeline test on B-site post-plants. Manual GRPO loop (bypasses TRL multimodal bug #5120). 20 steps: format pass 25%->75%, mean reward 0.008->0.321, grads stable. Proved the loop runs; not pursued further after pivot.

features.name: RECALL — retrieval-based advantage estimation
features.description: SUPERSEDED. kNN retrieval over tactical state embeddings to compute counterfactual outcome rewards during GRPO. 2013 samples indexed, 20% non-zero advantage signal. src/training/recall.py. Superseded by MuZero-style value heads on the world-model latent (W05).

features.name: GRPO training — strategic reasoning
features.description: SUPERSEDED. Full GRPO run on demo-derived decision data (D024 architecture). Never completed (last attempt: 40/50 steps, GPU crash, checkpoint-25 saved). Replaced by the world-model approach; strategic reasoning now comes from W05 + W06.

features.name: Evaluation & analysis (VLM)
features.description: SUPERSEDED. Per-field accuracy / decision quality / consistency across VLM models. Replaced by world-model probe-transfer evaluation (W03).
